title: Molten Festive Algerian Pea Eggplant Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan dish from Algeria, featuring pea and eggplant in a rich molten sauce, cooked to perfection in a clay pot. This recipe is perfect for special occasions and festive gatherings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large clay pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cubed eggplant and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the peas, tomato paste, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cover the clay pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender and the sauce is molten.
Remove the clay pot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Molten Festive Algerian Pea Eggplant Tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
